case_title: ANNE K. SYMON VS. GIANCARLO VEGA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED SEP-12-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA, GIANCARLO
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING GRANTED. -PRO TEM BARBARA ANSCHER-
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2009 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2010 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JUL-29-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES AGREED THAT DEFENDANT WILL PAY $50 PER MONTH STARTING MAY 15, 2010 AND ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL FULLY PAID. CONTINUE EVERY 2 MONTHS FOR PROGRESS REPORT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,900.00 FILED BY SYMON, ANNE K. AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA, GIANCARLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF FILED BY SYMON, ANNE K.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA, GIANCARLO HEARING SET FOR MAR-29-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAR-01-2010 AS TO DEFENDANT VEGA, GIANCARLO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2010 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-26-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506, FOR BENCH LETTER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-13-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SYMON, ANNE K. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VEGA, GIANCARLO $5,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,985.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2010; JUDGMENT DEBTOR GIANCARLO VEGA FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00.
